message:
fix(clippy): resolve --all-targets warnings across tests, benches, and source

Fixes ~15 clippy warnings found in test/bench/source files:
- format!("literal") → "literal".to_string() (4 instances)
- match with single useful arm → if let (6 instances)
- collapsible nested if → combined condition (2 instances)
- .into_iter() on already-iterable types removed (2 instances)
- 0 | 1 | 2 → 0..=2 range pattern
- Unit struct Default::default() → direct construction
- Redundant u128::try_from on already-u128 value
- Returning let binding → direct expression

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

+                .zip(scores)
                 .collect::<Vec<(u64, f32)>>()
         })
     })

                 .iter()

-                .zip(scores.into_iter())
+                .zip(scores)
